shortDescription: Character-filled 2-bedroom detached residence in Lawrence Park featuring original details and modern upgrades.
fullDescription: Welcome to 135 Chatsworth Drive in the vibrant Lawrence Park neighbourhood. This beautifully presented detached home offers generous living space across multiple levels. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Additional highlights include in-suite laundry, ample storage, and energy-efficient mechanicals. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Cosy living room with gas fireplace
Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
